description.unified: Engraves a rune on the target, dealing up to ??? P.DMG that [(added) ignores DEF] based on missing HP and reducing their P.DEF by [20%->50%] for [5 sec->8 sec].
Heals ??? HP of all allies. [(removed) reduces P.DMG taken by 30%]
Deals ??? P.DMG to all enemies, and dispels all positive effects. Inflicts Silences on target for [1.8 sec->3 sec].
Every [12 sec->10 sec], engraves a rune upon the ally with the lowest HP and recovers a total of ??? HP for 10 sec.
[Rune of Silence] Target takes 15% increased DMG for 10 sec, and target's CC resistance is reduced by {0}.

At the beginning of each battle, increases P.DEF and M.DEF by {0}% ATK Spd by {1} for [10 sec->15 sec], and adds an additional effect to the first skill used. [Rune of Healing] - [Clears all debuffs on yourself->Dispels CC inflicted on caster before the skill is cast]. [Rune of Silence] - Increases Silence duration [by 1 sec].

Summons the soul of Phoenix Quill, Belisa, creating a shield on [the 4 allies->an ally] with the highest ATK for 10 sec that absorbs ??? DMG, grants immunity to CC, and increase DMG dealt to enemies by 20% for 10 sec. Afterward, dispels positive effects of frontal enemies in a straight line and deals ??? P.DMG

1.from: Changes Skill Activation Requirements to 3 times.
1.to: Changes Skill Activation requirements to 3 times.
1.unified: Changes Skill Activation requirements to 3 times.

2.from: Prevents hit enemies from receiving positive effects for 4 sec.
2.to: Hit enemies cannot receive positive effects for 5 sec.
2.unified: Hit enemies cannot receive positive effects for [4 sec->5 sec].
